title: Information Technology - India's Best Private College in Andhra Pradesh
text:
Information Technology - India s Best Private College in Andhra Pradesh 
 Close 
 About Department 
 Vision 
 Mission 
 WKs & POs 
 PEOs 
 PSOs 
 Contact 
 Empowering Innovation. FosteringTechnological Excellence. The Department of Information Technology at Sasi Institute of Technology & Engineering is a hub of innovation and learning. Committed to shaping future leaders in IT, we provide a dynamic learning environment that nurtures creativity, problem-solvingskills, and technical expertise. The Department of Information Technology wasestablished in 2006 with an intake of 60; now the present intake is 120. The Teaching  learning and assessment process is outstanding through both traditional and innovative techniques. The Department organizes guest lectures, seminars, workshops and value added courses to fit for immediate industry needs. The Department also organizes National level technical fests for students and faculty development programs for faculty to improve the student/faculty interaction with outside world. The department supports students and faculty in successful completion of online courses from reputed organization like NPTEL, AWS Academy, Eduskills and coursera etc. The department has student chapters in various professional societies like CSI, ACM and IEEE and each student chapter organizes activities like Technical Symposiums, Hackathons under professional society. The department also supports students to complete internship/industrial training programs to prepare technocrats for job market. Top Hiring companies: Zscaler, Amandus, CapGemini, Accenture, Mphasis, Wipro, Cognizant-CTS, DeltaX, Efftronics, Hexaware, Infosys, Mindtree, NTT Data, TCS, Ugam. Accreditations: Bachelor of Technology (B. Tech) in Information Technology is accredited by the National Board of Accreditation (NBA) up to 2025. Our Approach: We blend theoretical learning with practical application, emphasizing hands-on experiences, industry exposure, and a comprehensive understanding of the latest technological advancements. Our curriculum is designed to meet the dynamic needs of the IT industry. Faculty: Our faculty comprises a diverse team of accomplished educators and industry experts. They bring a wealth of practical experience and academic rigor to the classroom, ensuring a well-rounded learning experience. Focus Areas: Software Development Web Development Cloud Computing and DevOps Networking and Security Data Science and Analytics Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning Student Opportunities: Industry Collaborations: Partnerships with leading IT firms offer internships, projects, and networking opportunities. Research Initiatives: Engage in groundbreaking research alongside faculty members, contributing to advancements in the field. Student Clubs and Activities: Participate in various clubs,hackathons, and tech-centric events to enhance skills and network with peers. Why Choose Us? Rigorous Curriculum: A comprehensive curriculum aligned with industry demands. Industry-Relevant Skills: Gain practical skills through hands-on projects and internships. Supportive Environment: A supportive faculty and collaborative peer community foster growth and learning.  Join Our Community: To sum it up, Programming and computation are two of the many linked fields that fall under the umbrella of information technology. IT offers a broad range of work choices and is applicable to numerous business sectors. Applicants that pursue an IT degree are guaranteed to have the best employment opportunities available. The department offers academic brilliance through a variety of initiatives, including regular training sessions, cutting-edge labs, unrestricted experimentation and research opportunities, etc. Embark on a transformative educational journey in InformationTechnology. Become part of a dynamic and innovative community at the Sasi Institute of Technology & Engineering. 
 To become a recognised centre of excellence for quality IT education and create professionals with the ability to solve social needs through invention and innovation. 
 To provide a quality student-centric learning environment that builds the necessary skills for employability and career development. To create a research ambience that accelerates innovations in the field of information technology. To impart value education to students so they can serve society with high integrity and good character. 
 Knowledge and Attitude Profile (WK) WK1 A systematic, theory-based understanding of the natural sciences applicable to the discipline and awareness of relevant social sciences. WK2 Conceptually-based mathematics, numerical analysis, data analysis, statistics and formal aspects of computer and information science to support detailed analysis and modelling applicable to the discipline. WK3 A systematic, theory-based formulation of engineering fundamentals required in the engineering discipline. WK4 Engineering specialist knowledge that provides theoretical frameworks and bodies of knowledge for the accepted practice areas in the engineering discipline; much is at the forefront of the discipline. WK5 Knowledge, including efficient resource use, environmental impacts, whole-life cost, re- use of resources, net zero carbon, and similar concepts, that supports engineering design and operations in a practice area. WK6 Knowledge of engineering practice (technology) in the practice areas in the engineering discipline. WK7 Knowledge of the role of engineering in society and identified issues in engineering practice in the discipline, such as the professional responsibility of an engineer to public safety and sustainable development. WK8 Engagement with selected knowledge in the current research literature of the discipline, awareness of the power of critical thinking and creative approaches to evaluate emerging issues. WK9 Ethics, inclusive behavior and conduct. Knowledge of professional ethics, responsibilities, and norms of engineering practice. Awareness of the need for diversity by reason of ethnicity, gender, age, physical ability etc. with mutual understanding and respect, and of inclusive attitudes. Program Outcomes: PO1 Engineering Knowledge: Apply knowledge of mathematics, natural science, computing, engineering fundamentals and an engineering specialization as specified in WK1 to WK4 respectively to develop to the solution of complex engineering problems. PO2 Problem Analysis: Identify, formulate, review research literature and analyze complex engineering problems reaching substantiated conclusions with consideration for sustainable development. (WK1 to WK4) PO3 Design/Development of Solutions: Design creative solutions for complex engineering problems and design/develop systems/components/processes to meet identified needs with consideration for the public health and safety, whole-life cost, net zero carbon, culture, society and environment as required. (WK5) PO4 Conduct Investigations of Complex Problems: Conduct investigations of complex engineering problems using research-based knowledge including design of experiments, modelling, analysis & interpretation of data to provide valid conclusions. (WK8). PO5 Engineering Tool Usage: Create, select and apply appropriate techniques, resources and modern engineering & IT tools, including prediction and modelling recognizing their limitations to solve complex engineering problems. (WK2 and WK6) PO6 The Engineer and The World: Analyze and evaluate societal and environmental aspects while solving complex engineering problems for its impact on sustainability with reference to economy, health, safety, legal framework, culture and environment. (WK1, WK5, and WK7). PO7 Ethics: Apply ethical principles and commit to professional ethics, human values, diversity and inclusion; adhere to national & international laws. (WK9) PO8 Individual and Collaborative Team work: Function effectively as an individual, and as a member or leader in diverse/multi-disciplinary teams. PO9 Communication: Communicate effectively and inclusively within the engineering community and society at large, such as being able to comprehend and write effective reports and design documentation, make effective presentations considering cultural, language, and learning differences PO10 Project Management and Finance: Apply knowledge and understanding of engineering management principles and economic decision-making and apply these to one’s own work, as a member and leader in a team, and to manage projects and in multidisciplinary environments. PO11 Life-Long Learning: Recognize the need for, and have the preparation and ability for i) independent and life-long learning ii) adaptability to new and emerging technologies and iii) critical thinking in the broadest context of technological change. (WK8) 
 Graduate will have proficient knowledge and skills to make significant contributions in the emerging fields of information technology. Graduates will pursue successful careers in information technology and allied industries, innovate and provide solutions for global needs. Graduates will have an attitude towards life-long learning and practice professional ethics. 
 Able to demonstrate a high level of proficiency in core IT skills, including programming, software development, database management, networking, and cyber security. Apply technical knowledge in diverse areas of IT and provide innovative solutions to industry problems. 
 Dr. K Subhash Bhagavan Head, Department of IT Sasi Institute of Technology & Engineering, Tadepalligudem e-mail: [email protected]

title: Master of Business Administration - India's Best Private College in Andhra Pradesh
text:
Master of Business Administration - India s Best Private College in Andhra Pradesh 
 Close 
 About Department 
 Vision 
 Mission 
 WKs & POs 
 PEOs 
 PSOs 
 Contact 
 Since its inception in 2007, the department and roled out hundreds of successful Management Post Graduates and Entrepreneurs with a unique blend of knowledge, skills and passion for excellence. Department of Management Science is a perfect blend of imparting knowledge and sharpening skills. The learning environment is filled with the rigor of academics and the joy of realizing their potential. The spacious digital class rooms and the state of the art seminar hall, computerized central library and sophisticated computer labs provide the world class infrastructure facilities that compete with the best in the industry. The Wi-Fi connected campus amid lush green fields offer an ideal environment for nurturing knowledge and intellectual pursuit. The class rooms with multimedia facilities make the learning process engaging and highly stimulating. The periodic interactive sessions organized for students with industry experts enlighten them about the current practices to be a successful administrator 
 To emerge as a forefront department in management studies, cultivating skilled managers equipped to tackle evolving global challenges 
 1. To impart value based management education, open new avenues for employment generation by developing skill and competency. 2. To transform students as professionals through a relentless pursuit of excellence in research and consultancy. 3. To create leaders with strong ethical values and a sense of professionalism. 
 Apply knowledge of management theories and practices to solve business problems. Foster Analytical and critical thinking abilities for data-based decision making. Ability to develop Value based Leadership ability. Ability to understand, analyze and communicate global, economic, legal, and ethical aspects of business. Ability to lead themselves and others in the achievement of organizational goals, contributing effectively to a team environment. Ability to develop strong foundation in functional areas like Finance, Marketing, HR, Operations, Systems & Quantitative Techniques. An ability to communicate effectively both verbal and non-verbal An ability to keep abreast the latest developments in the management education principles and practices for sustained vitality of the Industry and enhance Entrepreneurial spirit skills. 
 Student will be able to apply managerial skills and make significant contribution to the work place providing real time solutions to complex problems. Students will be able to pursue careers globally and contribute to research in solving complex industry problems. To inculcate the habit of sense of ethical and professional attitude. 
 PSO1: Ability toapply the fundamental knowledge of management science to solve the complex business problems PSO2: Able to apply multidisciplinary knowledge through simulated problems, case analysis, internships, industrial training, and projects. 
 Dr. P Rama Krishna Head, Department of MBA Sasi Institute of Technology & Engineering, Tadepalligudem e-mail: [email protected]

title: Applied Sciences & Humanities - India's Best Private College in Andhra Pradesh
text:
Applied Sciences & Humanities - India s Best Private College in Andhra Pradesh 
 Close 
 About Department 
 Contact 
 The Department of Applied Sciences & Humanities (AS& H) plays a crucial role in undergraduate engineering education. Ever since its establishment in 2002, the department has provided a strong foundation in the basic principles and applications of Engineering Mathematics, Engineering Physics, Engineering Chemistry, and English Language Communication Skills to the first-year students, Mathematics-III and Probability & Statistics for the second-year students, and a skill-based course on Soft Skills for the third-year students. Thus, the department lays a strong foundation that helps students excel in their higher semester studies. The department has highly qualified and experienced faculty that includes 12 doctorates, 3 faculty members pursuing their research, and 19 Assistant Professors. The department takes pride in the fact that its faculty has published a total of 96 papers and made paper presentations at various Seminars, Conferences, and Symposiums. Additionally, the department has also published 3 patent publications, which is a testament to its enthusiasm for research and innovative strategies. The department is equipped with well-established laboratories in Physics, Chemistry, and a digital language laboratory. In 2019, the Nanomaterials & Nanomagnetic Research Laboratory was established with the funding of the Bhabha Atomic Research Centre. This lab is a significant milestone in the department’s history and attracts research scholars from all over the country to conduct fundamental research in Nanomagnetic materials. The lab has also become a centre point for our IV B. Tech students to carry out their experimental work in various application domains like Antenna, Electromagnetic Interference, and Biomedical fields. 
 Dr. T V Raghu Head, Department of AS&H Sasi Institute of Technology & Engineering, Tadepalligudem E-mail: [email protected]
